description_long: This motorcycle features an elongated, chopper-style frame with a low-slung seat and a prominent, ribbed engine casing. The front fork is extended, giving the bike a stretched appearance, and the large front wheel is paired with a slightly smaller rear wheel. The handlebars are high and wide, resembling the 'ape hanger' style, and the overall color scheme is a muted, metallic bronze with black accents. The seat is contoured and appears to be made of leather or a similar material, while the exhaust pipes and other mechanical components are visible along the sides. The design is minimalist, with no visible fairings or body panels, emphasizing the exposed mechanical elements. This motorcycle would be well-suited for urban cruising or display in a custom bike show.
description: A custom chopper-style motorcycle with an elongated frame, high handlebars, and a ribbed metallic engine casing in bronze and black.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the extended front fork, large front wheel, and ribbed engine casing.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the contoured seat, rear wheel, and exposed frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the rear wheel, seat, and the curvature of the frame.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the high handlebars, front wheel, and engine details.
